element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player selects starting weapon; machine gun is default/baseline option
Core mechanic: free stance allows directional movement while firing; fixed immobilizes for precision
Combat and traversal verbs; enemy throw mechanic adds strategic depth
Emergent mechanic: any two weapons can combine (e.g., homing + machine gun, dual lightning)
Environmental stage format; changes spatial constraints and movement physics
Elevated platform stage format; enemy density and aerial positioning
Turn-based puzzle-combat hybrid; breaks standard run-and-gun rhythm
Persistent progression system; completing levels increases max health

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Frantic action with variable stage formats (linear run-and-gun, mine cart rails, aerial combat, board game) creates rhythm breaks; cooperative play amplifies intensity

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible entry with weapon selection and stance customization; first 4 stages selectable in any order allows difficulty scaling
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Varied stage formats (mine cart, helicopter) introduce environmental hazards and spatial complexity beyond basic run-and-gun
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stages 5-7 (fixed sequence) escalate enemy density and boss encounter scale; weapon combination mastery required
notable_spikes: Board game stage (rhythm shift to turn-based puzzle-combat)
Final boss encounters (documented as large-scale, establishing Treasure's signature aesthetic)

notable_level_patterns.description: Standard left-to-right progression with horizontal enemy streams; baseline stage format
Player rides along walls in constrained corridor; changes movement input mapping and spatial awareness
Fighting enemies on/around airborne platform; introduces vertical and elevation-based positioning, higher enemy density
Turn-based puzzle-combat stage; breaks run-and-gun rhythm entirely; strategic placement over reflexes
Stages 5-7 play in locked order; escalating difficulty and boss encounters; no player choice in progression path
